steps.title: Read the token values
steps.content: In the equation $6G+42R=336$, the coefficient of $G$ is the point value of one green token, and the coefficient of $R$ is the point value of one red token.

steps.title: Subtract the values
steps.content:
A red token is worth $42$ points, and a green token is worth $6$ points. The difference is
$$
42-6=36
$$
